                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: THE GREAT SIDDHĀNTA.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 04 the great siddhānta
                      • 05 there is no …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: There is no proof of non-differenced substance.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 05 there is no
                      • 06 Sound …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: S
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 06 Sound
                      • 07 pratyakshaeven of the …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Pratyaksha--even of the nirvikalpaka kind--proves difference.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 07 pratyakshaeven of the
                      • 08 the bhedābheda view …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The bhedābheda view is untenable.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 08 the bhedābheda view
                      • 09 inference also teaches …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Inference also teaches difference.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 09 inference also teaches
                      • 10 perception does not …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Perception does not reveal mere being.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 10 perception does not
                      • 11 plurality is not …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Plurality is not unreal.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 11 plurality is not
                      • 12 being and consciousness …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Being and consciousness are not one.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 12 being and consciousness
                      • 13 the true meaning …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The true meaning of Svayaṁprakāsatva.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 13 the true meaning
                      • 14 consciousness is not …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Consciousness is not eternal.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 14 consciousness is not
                      • 15 there is no …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: There is no consciousness without object.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 15 there is no
                      • 16 consciousness is capable …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Consciousness is capable of change.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 16 consciousness is capable
                      • 17 consciousness is the …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Consciousness is the attribute of a permanent Conscious self.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 17 consciousness is the
                      • 18 the view that …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The view that the conscious subject is something unreal, due to the ahaṁkāra, cannot be maintained.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 18 the view that
                      • 19 the conscious subject …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The conscious subject persists in deep sleep.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 19 the conscious subject
                      • 20 the conscious subject …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The conscious subject persists in the state of release.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 20 the conscious subject
                      • 21 in cases of …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: In cases of Scripture conflicting with Perception, Scripture is not stronger. The True cannot be known through the Untrue.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 21 in cases of
                      • 22 no scriptural texts …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: No scriptural texts teach a Brahman devoid of all difference.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 22 no scriptural texts
                      • 23 nor do smṛti …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Nor do Smr̥ti and Purāṇa teach such a doctrine.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 23 nor do smṛti
                      • 24 the theory of …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The theory of Nescience cannot be proved.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 24 the theory of
                      • 25 all knowledge is …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: All knowledge is of the Real.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 25 all knowledge is
                      • 26 neither scripture nor …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Neither Scripture nor Smr̥ti and Purāṇa teach Nescience.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 26 neither scripture nor
                      • 27 scripture does not …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Scripture does not teach that Release is due to the knowledge of a non-qualified Brahman.--the meaning of 'tat tvam asi.'
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 27 scripture does not
                      • 28 summary statement as …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Summary statement as to the way in which different scriptural texts are to reconciled.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 28 summary statement as
                      • 29 nescience cannot be …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: Nescience cannot be terminated by the simple act of cognising Brahman as the universal self.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 29 nescience cannot be
                      • 30 the vedāntin aiming …
                    • draft: false
                    • full_title: The Vedāntin aiming to ascertain the nature of Brahman from Scripture, need not be disconcerted by the Mīmāṁsā-theory of all speech having informing power with regard to actions only.
                    • iscjklanguage: false
                    • title: 30 the vedāntin aiming
